mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource_pool_credential (id, resource_pool_id, username, kubeconfig, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{resourcePoolId}, #{username}, #{kubeconfig}, #{expireAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resource_pool_credential WHERE resource_pool_id = #{resourcePoolId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM resource_pool_credential WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE resource_pool_credential SET username = #{username}, kubeconfig = #{kubeconfig}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
